mapper.select: SELECT a.ID, a.TRUST_ID, a.CARGO_INFO_ID, a.DIRECTION, a.QUANTITY, a.TON, a.CARGO_OWNER_ID, a.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, a.CARGO_AGENT_ID, a.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, a.CARGO_CODE, a.CARGO_NAME, a.PACKING_CODE, a.PACKING_NAME, a.CREATE_BY, a.CREATE_BY_NAME, a.CREATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_BY, a.UPDATE_BY_NAME, a.UPDATE_TIME, b.WORK_TYPE, a.CONTRACT_ID, a.CONTRACT_NAME, a.CONTRACT_RATE_ID, a.RATE, a.EST_AMOUNT, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, a.BUSINESS_NO, a.HATCHS, a.IS_SECOND_WEIGH, a.PRINT_POUND_ID, a.PRINT_POUND_NUM, a.RATE_LABEL, a.STATUS, a.IS_STOP, a.IS_STOP_OPERATION_NAME, a.IS_STOP_OPERATION_TIME FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO a inner join m_cargo b on a.CARGO_CODE=b.CARGO_CODE LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON a.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID where a.TRUST_ID = #{trustId} ORDER BY a.BUSINESS_NO

SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, DIRECTION, QUANTITY, TON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, BUSINESS_NO, HATCHS, IS_SECOND_WEIGH, PRINT_POUND_ID, PRINT_POUND_NUM, RATE_LABEL from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, BHT_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, DIRECTION, QUANTITY, TON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, BUSINESS_NO, HATCHS, IS_SECOND_WEIGH, PRINT_POUND_ID, PRINT_POUND_NUM, RATE_LABEL from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO
BHT_ID = #{bhtId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO( ID, TRUST_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, DELIVERY_NUMBERS, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, DIRECTION, QUANTITY, TON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, BHT_ID, WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_NAME, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, RATE, EST_AMOUNT, BUSINESS_NO, HATCHS, IS_SECOND_WEIGH, PRINT_POUND_ID, PRINT_POUND_NUM, RATE_LABEL, STATUS, DIS_RATE, ORDER_ITEM_ID, BILL_NO )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deliveryNumbers, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoAgentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{direction, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, SEQ_BHT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{workAccompanyingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractName,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractRateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{estAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{businessNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hatchs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isSecondWeigh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{printPoundId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{printPoundNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rateLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{billNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO SET TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{cargoOwnerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_OWNER_NAME = #{cargoOwnerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_AGENT_ID = #{cargoAgentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_AGENT_NAME = #{cargoAgentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PACKING_CODE = #{packingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PACKING_NAME = #{packingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIRECTION = #{direction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TON = #{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, HATCHS = #{hatchs, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_SECOND_WEIGH = #{isSecondWeigh, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRINT_POUND_ID = #{printPoundId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, PRINT_POUND_NUM = #{printPoundNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, RATE_LABEL = #{rateLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT T1.ID AS "shipvoyageId", T2.ID AS "value", CONCAT(CONCAT(T1.SHIP_NAME, '_') , T2.VOYAGE) as "label", T2.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME as "cargoCategoryName", T2.CUSTOMER_NAME as "shipAgentName", T1.START_PORT_NAME as "startPortName", T1.END_PORT_NAME as "endPortName", TO_CHAR(T1.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "arrivalTimePlan", T1.SCN as "scn", T1.SHIP_NAME as "shipName", T2.VOYAGE as "voyage" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T1 JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM T2 ON T1.ID = T2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID where T2.ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, BHT_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, DIRECTION, QUANTITY, TON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, HATCHS, IS_SECOND_WEIGH, PRINT_POUND_ID, PRINT_POUND_NUM, RATE_LABEL from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO
BUSINESS_NO = #{businessNo}
SELECT sum( WEIGHT_GOODS ) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 AND IS_FINISHED = 1 AND PLAN_NO = #{businessNo}
select distinct TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID ID ,TBTC.cargo_code from T_BUS_TRUST TBT left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on TBT.id = TBTC.TRUST_ID where TBT.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CARGO_SHIP (ID, TYPE, TRUST_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_VOYAGE_ID, SHIP_NAME, VOYAGE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id}, #{type}, #{trustId}, #{cargoInfoId}, #{shipVoyageItemId}, #{shipVoyageId}, #{shipName}, #{voyage}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete: delete from T_BUS_CARGO_SHIP where CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST set TRUST_CARGO_ID = #{trustCargoId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{updateByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId} and LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸'
update t_bus_entrust_detail set trust_cargo_id = #{id} , update_by = #{loginUserId}, update_by_name = #{loginUserName}, update_TIME = #{now} where id = #{entrustDetailId}
update t_bus_entrust_detail set cargo_info_id = #{cargoInfoId}, update_by = #{loginUserId}, update_by_name = #{loginUserName}, update_TIME = #{now} where trust_cargo_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_ENTRUST_DETAIL ( ID, ENTRUST_ID, TRUST_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, DELIVERY_NUMBERS, trust_cargo_id ) VALUES ( #{entrustDetailId}, #{entrustId}, #{trustId},#{cargoOwnerId},#{cargoOwnerName},#{cargoCode}, #{cargoName},#{packingCode},#{packingName}, #{quantity},#{ton},#{loginUserId},#{loginUserName},#{now}, #{deliveryNumbers},#{id} )
